mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employees ( emp_num, name, age, phone, position, contract_type, hourly_wage, monthly_salary, hire_date, resign_date, profile, bank_name, account_no, is_active ) VALUES ( #{emp_num}, #{name}, #{age}, #{phone}, #{position}, #{contract_type}, #{hourly_wage}, #{monthly_salary}, #{hire_date}, #{resign_date}, #{profile}, #{bank_name}, #{account_no}, 1 )
mapper.update: UPDATE employees SET profile = #{profile} WHERE emp_num = #{empNum}
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM employees WHERE emp_num = #{emp_num}
mapper.update: UPDATE employees SET emp_num = #{emp_num}, name = #{name}, age = #{age}, phone = #{phone}, position = #{position}, contract_type = #{contract_type}, hourly_wage = #{hourly_wage}, monthly_salary = #{monthly_salary}, hire_date = #{hire_date}, resign_date = #{resign_date}, profile = #{profile}, bank_name = #{bank_name}, account_no = #{account_no}, is_active = #{is_active} WHERE emp_num = #{emp_num}
mapper.select: SELECT e.id AS employee_id, e.emp_num, e.name, e.position, e.contract_type, e.profile, a.work_date, a.clock_in, a.clock_out, a.work_hours, a.note FROM employees e LEFT JOIN attendances a ON e.id = a.employee_id AND a.work_date = #{date} WHERE e.is_active = 1 ORDER BY e.id ASC

SELECT e.id AS employee_id, e.emp_num, e.name, a.work_date, a.clock_in, a.clock_out, a.work_hours, a.note FROM employees e LEFT JOIN attendances a ON e.id = a.employee_id AND a.work_date = #{date} WHERE e.is_active = 1 ORDER BY e.id ASC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employees WHERE is_active = 1
SELECT a.id, a.employee_id, e.name, a.clock_in, a.work_hours, a.note FROM attendances a JOIN employees e ON a.employee_id = e.emp_num WHERE a.work_date = #{date}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendances (employee_id, work_date, clock_in, clock_out, work_hours, note) VALUES (#{employee_id}, #{work_date}, #{clock_in}, #{clock_out}, #{work_hours}, #{note})
